---
name: Feature request
description: Request a new feature or operational improvement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: ["ai-task"]
---

## Task Type
Feature / Operational improvement / Dashboard / Report / Automation support

## Goal
Explain what needs to be built or improved in 1–2 sentences.

## User Flow
1. User does this
2. System shows this
3. User gets this result

## Business Reason
Why this matters:
- Internal efficiency
- Management visibility
- Reporting accuracy
- Employee experience
- Client service
- Risk reduction

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Requirement 1
- [ ] Requirement 2
- [ ] Requirement 3

## Constraints
- Do not change unrelated files
- Do not introduce new paid tools unless explicitly required
- Do not remove existing functionality
- Do not expose secrets
- Keep solution simple for a solo non-technical operator
- Preserve admin/security/data access behavior

## Testing Required
- [ ] Build passes
- [ ] Main flow works
- [ ] Mobile/responsive view checked if UI changed
- [ ] Admin/protected route behavior checked if relevant
- [ ] No console errors

## Final Output Expected From Agent
Agent must open a PR with:
- Summary of changes
- Files changed
- Tests/checks run
- Any setup needed
- Any risks or limitations
- Manual verification steps
